result: Establish a global basic-needs guarantee: every person has clean water, nutritious food, essential healthcare, safe shelter, and quality education. It tackles the root of most suffering and instability, unlocks human potential at scale, and makes many other challenges—conflict, crime, polarized politics, even climate resilience—far easier to solve. When survival isn’t in question, better futures become possible.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
